prompt: A breathtakingly enchanting and deeply moving hyper-realistic photograph of a beautiful radiant shaman queen performing a sacred blessing ritual with natural healing herbs and leaves in a magical tropical garden at golden hour. She is the same exact woman from the reference images — same face, same warm radiant glowing skin, same gentle loving features. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho with vivid rainbow V-shaped horizontal stripes in pink, hot pink, emerald green, blue, sky blue, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white, with colorful multicolored crocheted tassels along the bottom edge. The crocheted open-stitch texture is clearly visible. Same white wrapped turban with the golden braided band and turquoise-green oval gemstone at the forehead. POSE AND ACTION: She holds a lush, abundant bouquet of fresh sacred blessing herbs and green leaves in both hands — a thick bundle of aromatic rue (arruda), rosemary, basil, and wild forest leaves with visible stems, fresh and alive with dew drops catching the light. She holds the bundle with both hands at chest height, slightly extended forward as if about to bless someone standing before her. Her arms are gently extended offering the blessing. Her eyes are filled with immense love, compassion, and divine maternal warmth — looking directly toward the viewer with deep spiritual connection, as if she is blessing YOU through the image. Her smile radiates pure unconditional love, tenderness, and sacred healing energy. She is a vessel of Mother Earth's love, channeling the ancient healing power of plants and nature through her heart and hands. CRITICAL ENERGY EFFECTS: Spectacular god rays of thick warm golden sunlight burst through the tropical palm canopy from behind and above her, creating a divine golden backlight halo around her entire body. From the sacred herb bundle, visible wisps of luminous green and golden energy rise like sacred smoke or ethereal light vapor — the healing spirit of the plants made visible as shimmering emerald-green and golden luminous energy tendrils spiraling upward. Hundreds of golden particles and tiny green leaf-like sparks of light float in the air around her hands and the herbs, representing the life force of Mother Earth flowing through the plants into the blessing. The green energy from the herbs blends with the golden sunlight creating a magical emerald-gold aura around her hands. Her colorful crocheted poncho glows vibrantly in the backlight, each color stripe luminous. Her white turban radiates with an ethereal golden halo. Tropical palm fronds frame her like a natural cathedral. Strong cinematic lens flare. The entire scene pulsates with the raw healing energy of nature and unconditional love — this is a woman deeply connected to Mãe Terra, channeling the ancient wisdom of plants to heal and bless. Shot on professional DSLR, 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 160. Slightly low angle looking up, majestic perspective. Shallow depth of field, face and herb bundle razor-sharp, background dissolving into magical golden-green bokeh. This is the sacred heart of the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá — the healer offering nature's blessing with infinite love.
